main_issue_pattern: Irritation, redness, greasy texture, packaging leakage
why_this_case_matters: Tests whether the app can separate formula concerns from texture and packaging issues.

main_issue_pattern: White cast, sticky feel, strong smell
why_this_case_matters: Tests whether the app can group different sensory complaints into useful product issue categories.
Tests whether the app flags safety-like complaints for human review instead of making a final safety judgment.

main_issue_pattern: Dryness, tight skin feeling, not suitable for sensitive skin
why_this_case_matters: Tests whether the app can identify repeated skin-feel complaints.

main_issue_pattern: Unclear effect, fragrance complaints, expectation mismatch
why_this_case_matters: Tests whether the app can detect mismatch between customer expectations and product claims.

main_issue_pattern: Short vague reviews, emotional language, mixed feedback
why_this_case_matters: Tests whether the app avoids overclaiming when evidence is weak.
